notes.introduction: An exposition of 1 Thessalonians 5:15 on the Christian obligation to refuse retaliation and pursue good, set within a series of Wednesday evening studies on concise closing instructions in 1 Thessalonians 5. Parallel passages in Romans 12:17-21, Proverbs 24:29 and 25:21-22, 1 Peter 2:21-23, and Acts 10:38 are drawn in to develop two organizing principles.

sections.heading: Series Context and the Flesh vs. the Spirit
Principle of Grace: No Evil for Evil
Christ as the Example in 1 Peter 2
Pursuit of Good: Following That Which Is Upright
Acts 10:38 and Christ Going About Doing Good
John 15 and Abiding as the Basis for Both Principles
